prompt: Editorial Instagram carousel slide, 4:5 vertical format (1080x1350). Solid deep forest background #000F08. Two-column data layout with abundant negative space. Row 1 right (same vertical line): micro-label sage green #91B69D 22pt 'Faixa funcional Longevify' with value below in accent gold #C89136 36pt '10–25 U/L'. Vertical breathing gap. Then 'AST' in accent gold #C89136 88pt, label '(aspartato aminotransferase)' #f8fffc 26pt. Same two-column structure: left 'Range do laboratório' / 'até 40 U/L' (#f8fffc), right 'Faixa funcional Longevify' / '10–25 U/L' (gold #C89136). Bottom area, before logo space: editorial italic Georgia 30pt #f8fffc reading 'Você está "dentro" e ainda assim longe.' Small '02' slide number top-right in gold. RESERVE bottom 120px clear for logo overlay. Two columns precisely aligned. ABSOLUTELY NO test tubes, NO molecule illustrations, NO icons, NO bar charts, NO color blocks, NO gradient. Editorial typography only.
